label: prefix_hash • a paraphrased system prompt with the same tools hashes differently
notes: Semantically-similar but textually-different system prompts must hash differently with the same tool set — the hash is over the exact bytes that prime the KV cache, not over meaning. Reinforces system-content-changes-hash with a realistic paraphrase rather than a contrived edit.

prefixHash.systemContent: You are Osaurus, a local-first assistant. Be concise.

compareTo.systemContent: You are Osaurus, an on-device assistant. Keep answers short.
